# awscc_route53globalresolver_firewall_domain_list (Resource)

Resource schema for AWS::Route53GlobalResolver::FirewallDomainList



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `global_resolver_id` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `client_token` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `domain_file_url` (String) S3 URL to import domains from.
- `domains` (Set of String) An inline list of domains to use for this domain list.
- `tags` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

### Read-Only

- `arn` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `domain_count` (Number)
- `firewall_domain_list_id` (String)
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `status` (String)
- `status_message` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Optional:

- `key` (String)
- `value` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_route53globalresolver_firewall_domain_list.example
  identity = {
    firewall_domain_list_id = "firewall_domain_list_id"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `firewall_domain_list_id` (String)

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_route53globalresolver_firewall_domain_list.example
  id = "firewall_domain_list_id"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_route53globalresolver_firewall_domain_list.example "firewall_domain_list_id"
```
